---
title: "PBC Tarpon Cove"
author: "EWilliams"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Data request for Palm Beach County Tarpon Cove report providing Lake Worth data and summary tables

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,  warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
#
folder_name <- "../PBC_TarponCove"
start_date <- as.Date("2025-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2025-12-31")
Database <- "Oysters_26-06-25"
Server <- "localhost\\ERICALOCALSQL"
EstuaryCode <- c("LW")
#
if (!require("pacman")) {install.packages("pacman")}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,
               odbc,
               DBI, 
               dbplyr, 
               lubridate,
               openxlsx)
#
#
```


```{r formulas and metadata setup}
#
tables <- tibble::tribble(
  ~TABLE_SCHEMA, ~TABLE_NAME,
  "dbo", "FixedLocations",
  "dbo",  "TripInfo",
  "hsdb", "SurveyQuadrat",
  "dbo", "SurveyQuadrat",
  "hsdb", "SurveySH",
  "dbo", "SurveySH",
  "hsdb", "Dermo",
  "dbo", "Dermo",
  "hsdb", "Recruitment",
  "dbo", "Recruitment",
  "hsdb", "SedimentTrap",
  "dbo", "SedimentTrap",
  "dbo", "DataDictionary"
)
#
get_metadata <- function(con, tables = NULL) {
  
  # ---- column structure & types ----
  cols <- tbl(con, in_schema("INFORMATION_SCHEMA", "COLUMNS")) %>%
    select(
      TABLE_SCHEMA,
      TABLE_NAME,
      COLUMN_NAME,
      DATA_TYPE,
      ORDINAL_POSITION
    )
  
  # ---- column descriptions (SQL Server specific) ----
  descriptions <- tbl(con, in_schema("sys", "columns")) %>%
    rename(COLUMN_NAME = name) %>%
    inner_join(
      tbl(con, in_schema("sys", "tables")) %>%
        rename(TABLE_NAME = name),
      by = "object_id"
    ) %>%
    inner_join(
      tbl(con, in_schema("sys", "schemas")) %>%
        rename(TABLE_SCHEMA = name),
      by = "schema_id"
    ) %>%
    left_join(
      tbl(con, in_schema("sys", "extended_properties")) %>%
        filter(name == "MS_Description"),
      by = c(
        "object_id" = "major_id",
        "column_id" = "minor_id"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(
      TABLE_SCHEMA,
      TABLE_NAME,
      COLUMN_NAME,
      DESCRIPTION = value
    )
  
  # ---- optionally limit to specific tables ----
  if (!is.null(tables)) {
    tables <- tables %>%
      select(TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME)
    
    tables_sql <- copy_to(con, tables, overwrite = TRUE)
    
    cols <- cols %>%
      inner_join(
        tables_sql,
        by = c("TABLE_SCHEMA", "TABLE_NAME")
      )
    
    descriptions <- descriptions %>%
      inner_join(
        tables_sql,
        by = c("TABLE_SCHEMA", "TABLE_NAME")
      )
  }
  
  # ---- combine & return ----
  cols %>%
    left_join(
      descriptions,
      by = c("TABLE_SCHEMA", "TABLE_NAME", "COLUMN_NAME")
    ) %>%
    arrange(TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION) %>%
    select(
      TABLE_SCHEMA,
      TABLE_NAME,
      COLUMN_NAME,
      DATA_TYPE,
      DESCRIPTION
    ) %>%
    collect()
}
#
# Function to subset to desired columns:
subset_columns <- function(df, cols) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(setdiff(cols, names(.)), ~ NA)) %>%  # add missing
    select(all_of(cols))
}
#
# Functions to write data to Excel workbook 
write_metadata_to_excel <- function(datalist, file_path, sheet_name = "Metadata", space = 2, Data_comments = NULL) {
  # datalist: named list of data frames
  # file_path: where to save the Excel file
  # space: number of empty rows between tables
  
  EXCEL_MAX_ROWS <- 1048576
  
  # Create workbook if needed
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
  wb <- loadWorkbook(file_path)
} else {
  wb <- createWorkbook()
}
  
  # Styles
  title_style  <- createStyle(textDecoration = "bold")
  header_style <- createStyle(textDecoration = "bold")
  note_style   <- createStyle(textDecoration = "italic", wrapText = TRUE, valign = "top")
  
  sheet_index <- 1
  current_sheet <- sheet_name
  addWorksheet(wb, current_sheet)
  
  start_row <- 1
  max_cols  <- 1  # track widest table for auto-fit
  sheets_used <- current_sheet
  
  new_sheet <- function() {
    sheet_index <<- sheet_index + 1
    current_sheet <<- paste0(sheet_name, "_", sheet_index)
    addWorksheet(wb, current_sheet)
    sheets_used <<- c(sheets_used, current_sheet)
    start_row <<- 1
  }
  
  for(name in names(datalist)) {
    
    df <- datalist[[name]]
    n_rows <- nrow(df)
    n_cols <- ncol(df)
    max_cols <- max(max_cols, n_cols)
    
    
    # Estimate rows needed (title + header + data + spacing)
    notes <- character(0)
    if (!is.null(Data_comments)) {
      notes <- Data_comments %>%
        filter(
          gsub("\\s+", "", tolower(DataTable)) ==
            gsub("\\s+", "", tolower(name))
        ) %>%
        pull(Comment)
    }
    
    rows_needed <- 1 + 1 + n_rows + 1 +
      if (length(notes) > 0) length(notes) + 2 else 0 +
      space
    
    if (start_row + rows_needed > EXCEL_MAX_ROWS) {
      new_sheet()
    }
    
    # write table title (bold)
    writeData(
      wb,
      sheet = current_sheet,
      x = name,
      startRow = start_row,
      startCol = 1
    )
    
    addStyle(
      wb,
      sheet = current_sheet,
      style = title_style,
      rows = start_row,
      cols = 1,
      gridExpand = TRUE,
      stack = TRUE
    )
    
    start_row <- start_row + 1
    
    # write table data
    writeData(
      wb,
      sheet = current_sheet,
      x = df,
      startRow = start_row,
      startCol = 1,
      withFilter = FALSE
    )
    
    # bold column headers
    addStyle(
      wb,
      sheet = current_sheet,
      style = header_style,
      rows = start_row,
      cols = 1:n_cols,
      gridExpand = TRUE,
      stack = TRUE
    )
    
    start_row <- start_row + n_rows + 1
    
    # Add notes (if present)
    if (length(notes) > 0) {
      
      writeData(
        wb,
        current_sheet,
        x = "Notes:",
        startRow = start_row,
        startCol = 1
      )
      addStyle(wb, current_sheet, title_style, start_row, 1)
      start_row <- start_row + 1
      
      for (note in notes) {
        
        if (start_row >= EXCEL_MAX_ROWS) {
          new_sheet()
        }
        
        writeData(
          wb,
          current_sheet,
          x = note,
          startRow = start_row,
          startCol = 1
        )
        
        mergeCells(
          wb,
          sheet = current_sheet,
          cols = 1:max(3, max_cols),
          rows = start_row
        )
        
        addStyle(
          wb,
          current_sheet,
          note_style,
          start_row,
          1:max_cols,
          gridExpand = TRUE
        )
        
        setRowHeights(
          wb,
          sheet = current_sheet,
          rows = start_row,
          heights = "auto"
        )
        
        start_row <- start_row + 1
      }
      
      start_row <- start_row + space
    }
    
    start_row <- start_row + space
  }
  
  # ---- Column widths on all sheets ----
  for (s in sheets_used) {
    setColWidths(wb, s, cols = 1, widths = 22)
    if (max_cols > 1) {
      setColWidths(wb, s, cols = 2:max_cols, widths = "auto")
    }
  }
  
  saveWorkbook(wb, file = file_path, overwrite = TRUE)
}
#
add_tables_to_workbook <- function(wb, datalist, sheet_prefix = "Table", with_filter = TRUE) {
  # wb: an existing openxlsx workbook object
  # datalist: named or unnamed list of data.frames
  # sheet_prefix: used if datalist is unnamed
  # with_filter: add Excel filters to headers
  
  EXCEL_MAX_ROWS <- 1048576
  HEADER_ROWS    <- 1
  DATA_ROWS_MAX  <- EXCEL_MAX_ROWS - HEADER_ROWS
  
  # Counter for unnamed sheets
  counter <- 1
  
  for(name in names(datalist)) {
    df <- datalist[[name]]
    n <- nrow(df)
    
    # Determine sheet name
    base_name <- if(!is.null(name) && nzchar(name)) {
      name
    } else {
      paste0(sheet_prefix, "_", counter)
    }
    
    # Make sure sheet name is unique (Excel allows max 31 chars)
    base_name <- substr(base_name, 1, 31)
    # Number of chunks needed
    n_chunks <- ceiling(n / DATA_ROWS_MAX)
    
    for (i in seq_len(n_chunks)) {
      
      start <- (i - 1) * DATA_ROWS_MAX + 1
      end   <- min(i * DATA_ROWS_MAX, n)
      
      df_chunk <- df[start:end, , drop = FALSE]
      
      sheet_name <- if (n_chunks == 1) {
        base_name
      } else {
        substr(paste0(base_name, "_", i), 1, 31)
      }
      
      # Ensure uniqueness in workbook
      original_name <- sheet_name
      suffix <- 1
      while(sheet_name %in% names(wb)) {
        sheet_name <- substr(
          paste0(original_name, "_", suffix),
          1,
          31
        )
        suffix <- suffix + 1
      }
      
      addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
      
      writeData(
        wb,
        sheet = sheet_name,
        x = df_chunk,
        withFilter = with_filter
      )
    }
    
    counter <- counter + 1
  }
  
  return(wb)
}
#
#
#
#
#
```


```{r database download}
# Connect to Local database server and pull all necessary data, then close connection 
con <- dbConnect(odbc(),
                    Driver = "SQL Server", 
                    Server = Server,
                    Database = Database,
                    Authentication = "ActiveDirectoryIntegrated")
#
metadata <- get_metadata(con, tables)
#
# General info
dboDataDictionary <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "DataDictionary")) %>%
  dplyr::select(SortOrder, SchemaName, TableName, ColumnName, DataType, Definition) %>%
  collect()
#
dboFixedLocations <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "FixedLocations")) %>% 
  filter(Estuary %in% EstuaryCode)%>%
  collect() 
#
# Trip info
hsdbTripInfo <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "TripInfo")) %>%
  filter(substring(TripID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
           TripDate >= start_date & 
           TripDate <= end_date & 
           substring(TripID,3,6) == "SRVY") %>%
  collect() 
dboTripInfo <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "TripInfo")) %>%
  filter(substring(TripID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
           TripDate >= start_date & 
           TripDate <= end_date & 
           substring(TripID,3,6) == "SRVY" & 
           DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect() 
#
# Sample Info 
hsdbSampleEvent <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "SampleEvent")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      substring(SampleEventID,3,6) == "SRVY") %>%
  collect() 
dboSampleEvent <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "SampleEvent")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      substring(SampleEventID,3,6) == "SRVY" & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect() 
#
# Survey data
hsdbSurveyQuadrat <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "SurveyQuadrat")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(QuadratID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      substring(SampleEventID,3,6) == "SRVY") %>%
  collect() 
dboSurveyQuadrat <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "SurveyQuadrat")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(QuadratID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      substring(SampleEventID,3,6) == "SRVY" & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed")  %>%
  collect()
#
hsdbSurveySH <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "SurveySH")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(QuadratID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(QuadratID, 19, 22),
    QuadratNumber = substring(QuadratID, 26, 27),
    SHNumber = substring(ShellHeightID, 29, 31)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(QuadratID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date) %>%
  collect()
dboSurveySH <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "SurveySH")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(QuadratID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(QuadratID, 19, 22),
    QuadratNumber = substring(QuadratID, 26, 27),
    SHNumber = substring(ShellHeightID, 29, 31)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(QuadratID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect()
#
# Dermo data
hsdbDermo <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "Dermo")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22),
    SampleNumber = substring(OysterID, 10, 11)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date) %>%
  collect()
dboDermo <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "Dermo")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22),
    SampleNumber = substring(OysterID, 10, 11)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect()
#
# Recruitment data
hsdbRcrt <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "Recruitment")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date) %>%
  collect()
dboRcrt <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "Recruitment")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect()
#
# Sediment data
hsdbSedi <- tbl(con,in_schema("hsdb", "SedimentTrap")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22),
    SampleNumber = substring(CupSampleID, 9, 12)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date) %>%
  collect()
dboSedi <- tbl(con,in_schema("dbo", "SedimentTrap")) %>% 
  mutate(
    TripDate = as.Date(substring(SampleEventID, 8, 15)),
    FixedLocationID = substring(SampleEventID, 19, 22),
    SampleNumber = substring(CupSampleID, 9, 12)) %>%
  filter(
    substring(SampleEventID,1,2) %in% EstuaryCode & 
      TripDate >= start_date & 
      TripDate <= end_date & 
      DataStatus == "Proofed") %>%
  collect()
#
#
DBI::dbDisconnect(con)
#
```


```{r data cleaning}
#
## Survey counts
Srvy_columns <- c("QuadratID", "SampleEventID", "QuadratNumber", "NumLive", "NumDead", "FixedLocationID", "TripDate")

hsdbSurveyQuadrat_sub <- hsdbSurveyQuadrat %>% subset_columns(Srvy_columns)
dboSurveyQuadrat_sub  <- dboSurveyQuadrat  %>% subset_columns(Srvy_columns) 

SurveyQuads <- bind_rows(hsdbSurveyQuadrat_sub, dboSurveyQuadrat_sub)
rm(hsdbSurveyQuadrat, dboSurveyQuadrat, hsdbSurveyQuadrat_sub, dboSurveyQuadrat_sub)

Survey_meta <- dboDataDictionary %>% 
  filter(TableName == "SurveyQuadrat" & ColumnName %in% Srvy_columns) %>%
  arrange(SortOrder) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("SortOrder", "SchemaName")) %>%
  distinct()
#
SrvyData <- SurveyQuads %>%
  left_join(dboFixedLocations %>%
              dplyr::select(FixedLocationID, Estuary, SectionName, StationName, StationNumber)) %>%
  mutate(Live_m2 = NumLive * 4,
         Dead_m2 = NumDead * 4) %>%
  relocate(TripDate, .after = everything())
#
#
## Survey SHs
SrvySH_columns <- c("ShellHeightID", "QuadratID", "ShellHeight", "QuadratNumber", "SHNumber", "TripDate", "FixedLocationID")

hsdbSurveySH_sub <- hsdbSurveySH %>% subset_columns(SrvySH_columns)
dboSurveySH_sub  <- dboSurveySH  %>% subset_columns(SrvySH_columns) %>%
  mutate(ShellHeight = as.numeric(ShellHeight))

SurveySHs <- bind_rows(hsdbSurveySH_sub, dboSurveySH_sub)
rm(hsdbSurveySH, dboSurveySH, hsdbSurveySH_sub, dboSurveySH_sub)

SurveySH_meta <- metadata %>%
  filter(TABLE_NAME == "SurveySH" & COLUMN_NAME %in% SrvySH_columns) %>%
  dplyr::select(-TABLE_SCHEMA) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(!(COLUMN_NAME == "ShellHeight" & DATA_TYPE == "varchar")) %>%
  distinct() 
colnames(SurveySH_meta) <- colnames(Survey_meta)
#
SrvySHData <- SurveySHs %>%
  left_join(dboFixedLocations %>%
              dplyr::select(FixedLocationID, Estuary, SectionName, StationName, StationNumber)) %>%
  relocate(TripDate, .after = everything())
#
#
## Dermo 
Dermo_columns <- c("OysterID", "SampleEventID", "ShellHeight", "TotalWeight", "ShellWetWeight", "DermoMantle", "DermoGill", "TripDate", "FixedLocationID", "SampleNumber")

hsdbDermo_sub <- hsdbDermo %>% subset_columns(Dermo_columns)
dboDermo_sub  <- dboDermo  %>% subset_columns(Dermo_columns) 

Dermo_t <- bind_rows(hsdbDermo_sub, dboDermo_sub)
rm(hsdbDermo, dboDermo, hsdbDermo_sub, dboDermo_sub)

Dermo_meta <- dboDataDictionary %>% 
  filter(TableName == "Dermo" & ColumnName %in% Dermo_columns) %>%
  arrange(SortOrder) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("SortOrder", "SchemaName")) %>%
  distinct()
#
DermoData <- Dermo_t %>%
  left_join(dboFixedLocations %>%
              dplyr::select(FixedLocationID, Estuary, SectionName, StationName, StationNumber)) %>%
  relocate(TripDate, .after = everything())
#
#
## Recruitment 
Rcrt_columns <- c("ShellID", "SampleEventID", "DeployedDate", "ShellReplicate", "ShellPosition", "NumTop", "NumBottom", "TripDate", "FixedLocationID")

hsdbRcrt_sub <- hsdbRcrt %>% subset_columns(Rcrt_columns)
dboRcrt_sub  <- dboRcrt  %>% subset_columns(Rcrt_columns) 

Rcrt_t <- bind_rows(hsdbRcrt_sub, dboRcrt_sub)
rm(hsdbRcrt, dboRcrt, hsdbRcrt_sub, dboRcrt_sub)

Rcrt_meta <- dboDataDictionary %>% 
  filter(TableName == "Recruitment" & ColumnName %in% Rcrt_columns) %>%
  arrange(SortOrder) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("SortOrder", "SchemaName")) %>%
  distinct()
#
RcrtData <- Rcrt_t %>%
  left_join(dboFixedLocations %>%
              dplyr::select(FixedLocationID, Estuary, SectionName, StationName, StationNumber)) %>%
  relocate(TripDate, .after = everything())
#
#
## Sediment 
Sedi_columns <- c("CupSampleID", "SampleEventID", "DeployedDate", "PanDryWeight", "PanTareWeight", "FilterDryWeight", "FilterTareWeight", "CrucibleDW", "TareCrucible", "PortionofSample", "AshWeight", "TripDate", "FixedLocationID", "SampleNumber")

hsdbSedi_sub <- hsdbSedi %>% subset_columns(Sedi_columns)
dboSedi_sub  <- dboSedi  %>% subset_columns(Sedi_columns) 

Sedi_t <- bind_rows(hsdbSedi_sub, dboSedi_sub)
rm(hsdbSedi, dboSedi, hsdbSedi_sub, dboSedi_sub)

Sedi_meta <- dboDataDictionary %>% 
  filter(TableName == "Sediment" & ColumnName %in% Sedi_columns) %>%
  arrange(SortOrder) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c("SortOrder", "SchemaName")) %>%
  distinct()
#
SediData <- Sedi_t %>%
  left_join(dboFixedLocations %>%
              dplyr::select(FixedLocationID, Estuary, SectionName, StationName, StationNumber)) %>%
  relocate(TripDate, .after = everything())
#
#
#
#
```


```{r data summary}
#
# Table of data outline
outline <- data.frame(
  Label = c("Data pulled:", "Pulled for:", "Start date:", "End date:"),
  Value = c(paste(Sys.Date()), "Tarpon Cove Report", paste0(format(start_date, "%Y"),"-", format(start_date, "%m")), paste0(format(end_date, "%Y"),"-", format(end_date, "%m"))))
#
# Survey counts
Live_counts <- SrvyData %>%
  mutate(SurveyDate = paste0(substr(TripDate, 6, 7), "/01/", substr(TripDate, 1 ,4))) %>%
  group_by(SurveyDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(LiveMean = round(mean(Live_m2, na.rm = T),2),
            LiveSD = round(sd(Live_m2, na.rm = T), 2),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(LiveMean, LiveSD), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  dplyr::select(SurveyDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "SurveyDate")))
#
Dead_counts <- SrvyData %>%
  mutate(SurveyDate = paste0(substr(TripDate, 6, 7), "/01/", substr(TripDate, 1 ,4)),
         DeadRatio = as.numeric(Dead_m2/(Live_m2+Dead_m2))) %>%
  group_by(SurveyDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(DeadRatioMean = round(mean(DeadRatio, na.rm = T),2),
            DeadRatioSD = round(sd(DeadRatio, na.rm = T), 2),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(DeadRatioMean, DeadRatioSD), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  dplyr::select(SurveyDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "SurveyDate")))
#
# Survey SHs
SHs <- SrvySHData %>%
  mutate(SurveyDate = paste0(substr(TripDate, 6, 7), "/01/", substr(TripDate, 1 ,4))) %>%
  group_by(SurveyDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(SHMean = round(mean(ShellHeight, na.rm = T),2),
            SHSD = round(sd(ShellHeight, na.rm = T), 2),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(SHMean, SHSD), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  dplyr::select(SurveyDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "SurveyDate")))
# 
# Dermo
Dermo <- DermoData %>%
  mutate(DermoMean = rowMeans(.[, c("DermoMantle", "DermoGill")], na.rm = TRUE),
         DermoSum = as.numeric(ifelse(rowSums(select(., contains("Dermo"))) >0, 1, 0))) %>%
  group_by(TripDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(Mean = round(mean(DermoMean, na.rm = T),2),
            SD = round(sd(DermoMean, na.rm = T), 2),
            Pct = (sum(DermoSum, na.rm = TRUE)/n())*100,
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(Mean, SD, Pct), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  #dplyr::select(TripDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "TripDate"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(intersect(
    c("TripDate", sprintf("%s_%s", 
                          rep(sort(unique(DermoData$StationName)), each = 3), 
                          c("Mean", "SD", "Pct"))), 
    names(.))))
#
# Recruitment
Rcrt <- RcrtData %>%
  mutate(DaysDeployed = as.numeric(as.Date(TripDate) - as.Date(DeployedDate)), 
         NumTop = case_when(ShellPosition %in% c(1, 6, 7, 12) ~ NA_real_,
                            TRUE ~ NumTop),
         NumBottom = case_when(ShellPosition %in% c(1, 6, 7, 12) ~ NA_real_,
                            TRUE ~ NumBottom)) %>%
  mutate(BottomMonth = NumBottom/(DaysDeployed/28)) %>%
  group_by(TripDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(Mean = round(mean(BottomMonth, na.rm = T),2),
            SD = round(sd(BottomMonth, na.rm = T), 2),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(Mean, SD), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  dplyr::select(TripDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "TripDate")))
#
#
# Sediment
Sedi <- SediData %>%
  mutate(TotalDW = (PanDryWeight - PanTareWeight) + (FilterDryWeight - FilterTareWeight),
         Proportion = round((CrucibleDW-TareCrucible)/((PanDryWeight - PanTareWeight) + (FilterDryWeight - FilterTareWeight)),3),
         TotalAsh = case_when(is.na(Proportion) ~(AshWeight - TareCrucible)*(1/PortionofSample), TRUE ~ (AshWeight - TareCrucible)*(1/Proportion)),
         PctOrganic = ((TotalDW-round(TotalAsh,3))/TotalDW)*100,
         OrganicWt = TotalDW*(PctOrganic/100)) %>%
  group_by(TripDate, StationName) %>%
  summarise(Mean = round(mean(TotalDW, na.rm = T),2),
            SD = round(sd(TotalDW, na.rm = T), 2),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = StationName, values_from = c(Mean, SD), names_glue = "{StationName}_{.value}") %>%
  dplyr::select(TripDate, sort(setdiff(names(.), "TripDate")))
#

#
#
```


```{r Excel file output}
#
Excelfile <- paste0("LW_Summary_Data_",
                    format(start_date, "%Y"), format(start_date, "%m"), "_",
                    format(end_date, "%Y"), format(end_date, "%m"),
                    ".xlsx")
#
#
# Compile metadata
Metadata_base <- read.csv("../Column_names_meta.csv")
Data_comments <- read.csv("../Data_comments.csv") %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Filter == "CERP" | is.na(Filter))
#
datatables <- list(
  "Data outline" = outline, 
  "Locations" = Metadata_base %>% 
    dplyr::filter(Tab == "FixedLocations") %>%
    dplyr::select(-Column),
  "Survey Quadrat" = bind_rows(
      Metadata_base %>% 
        dplyr::filter(Tab == "SurveyQuadrat" & DatabaseColumn %in% colnames(SrvyData)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-Column),
      Survey_meta %>%
        filter(ColumnName %in% colnames(SrvyData) & !(ColumnName %in% Metadata_base$DatabaseColumn)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-DataType) %>%
        transmute(
          Tab = TableName,
          DatabaseColumn = ColumnName,
          Description = Definition
        )),
  "Survey Shell Height" = bind_rows(
      Metadata_base %>% 
        dplyr::filter(Tab == "SurveySH" & DatabaseColumn %in% colnames(SrvySHData)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-Column),
      SurveySH_meta %>%
        filter(ColumnName %in% colnames(SrvySHData) & !(ColumnName %in% Metadata_base$DatabaseColumn)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-DataType) %>%
        transmute(
          Tab = TableName,
          DatabaseColumn = ColumnName,
          Description = Definition
        )),
  "Dermo" = bind_rows(
    Metadata_base %>% 
      dplyr::filter(Tab == "Dermo" & DatabaseColumn %in% colnames(Dermo_t)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-Column),
    Dermo_meta %>%
      filter(ColumnName %in% colnames(Dermo_t) & !(ColumnName %in% Metadata_base$DatabaseColumn)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-DataType) %>%
      transmute(
        Tab = TableName,
        DatabaseColumn = ColumnName,
        Description = Definition
      )),
  "Recruitment" = bind_rows(
    Metadata_base %>% 
      dplyr::filter(Tab == "Recruitment" & DatabaseColumn %in% colnames(Rcrt_t)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-Column),
    Rcrt_meta %>%
      filter(ColumnName %in% colnames(Rcrt) & !(ColumnName %in% Metadata_base$DatabaseColumn)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-DataType) %>%
      transmute(
        Tab = TableName,
        DatabaseColumn = ColumnName,
        Description = Definition
      )),
  "Sediment" = bind_rows(
    Metadata_base %>% 
      dplyr::filter(Tab == "Sediment" & DatabaseColumn %in% colnames(Sedi_t)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-Column),
    Sedi_meta %>%
      filter(ColumnName %in% colnames(Sedi) & !(ColumnName %in% Metadata_base$DatabaseColumn)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-DataType) %>%
      transmute(
        Tab = TableName,
        DatabaseColumn = ColumnName,
        Description = Definition
      ))
)
#
# Write meta to Excel
write_metadata_to_excel(datatables, 
                        paste0(folder_name,"/", Excelfile), 
                        sheet_name = "Metadata",
                        space = 2,
                        Data_comments = Data_comments %>% dplyr::select(-Filter))
#
# Add summary tables:
datatables2 <- list(
  "Survey Live" = Live_counts,
  "Survey Dead" = Dead_counts,
  "Survey SH" = SHs,
  "Dermo" = Dermo,
  "Recruitment" = Rcrt,
  "Sedimentation Rate" = Sedi)
#
# Add data tables:
datatables3 <- list(
  "SurveyCounts" = SrvyData,
  "SurveySH" = SrvySHData,
  "Dermo" = Dermo_t,
  "Rcrt" = Rcrt_t,
  "Sdtp" = Sedi_t
)
#
#
write_metadata_to_excel(datatables2, 
                        paste0(folder_name,"/", Excelfile), 
                        sheet_name = "Summary",
                        space = 1)
#
wb <- loadWorkbook(paste0(folder_name,"/", Excelfile))
wb <- add_tables_to_workbook(wb, datatables3)
# Auto-adjust column widths
setColWidths(wb, sheet = "SurveyCounts", cols = 1:ncol(SrvyData), widths = "auto")
setColWidths(wb, sheet = "SurveySH", cols = 1:ncol(SrvySHData), widths = "auto")
setColWidths(wb, sheet = "Dermo", cols = 1:ncol(Dermo), widths = "auto")
setColWidths(wb, sheet = "Rcrt", cols = 1:ncol(Rcrt), widths = "auto")
setColWidths(wb, sheet = "Sdtp", cols = 1:ncol(Sedi), widths = "auto")
# Save the modified workbook
saveWorkbook(wb, Excelfile, overwrite = TRUE)
#
#  
#
```

Data was saved to `r paste0(folder_name,"/", Excelfile)`
